title: Inside Hailey Bieber’s Saint Laurent Bag | In the Bag? | Vogue

questions.question: What does Hailey Bieber say about her hand cream in this video?
options: B) She uses it when her hands feel dry
C) It's a new product she just bought
D) She doesn't use it often
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第30-32行，Hailey说'this is my hand cream that I have with me at all times, you know, just for when my hands are feeling a little bit dry.'（这是我的手霜，我随时带着，主要是当手感觉干燥时使用。）

questions.question: What does the word 'Obsessed' mean in the context of 'Obsessed with this'?
questions.explanation: 在第15和33行，Hailey多次说'I'm obsessed with it'和'Obsessed with this'，在美式口语中'obsessed'表示非常喜欢、迷恋某物。

questions.question: What is the lip treatment product that Hailey mentions as her 'road lip treatment'?
questions.explanation: 第18行提到'this, of course, is my road lip treatment'，结合上下文，这是她在路上使用的唇部护理产品，属于润唇膏类的护唇产品。

questions.question: What does Hailey use her phone for according to the video?
options: C) Social media and anonymous activities
questions.explanation: 第4行提到'surfing anonymously, commenting, stalking'，这些都是在描述手机用于社交媒体活动。

questions.question: What is the 'Haley Bieber smoothie' mentioned in the video?
questions.explanation: 第5行和第9-11行提到'this specifically for me'和'She told me that it would make a young Canadian pop star fall in me'，这似乎是一种美容产品或补品。

questions.question: What does Hailey say about her sleeping mask?
options: A) She wears it at parties
B) She wears it when sleeping
C) She uses it as a hand cream
questions.explanation: 第48行明确说'this is my sleeping mask that I wear when I'm'，这是一个睡眠面膜，睡觉时使用的产品。

questions.question: What does 'gatekeeping' mean in 'I have been gatekeeping this one because it's really special'?
questions.explanation: 第23行提到'gatekeeping'，在网络流行语中意为'藏着掖着'、不与人分享。Hailey说这个产品对她很特别，所以一直留着不舍得分享。

questions.question: What is Hailey's favorite perfume described as?
questions.explanation: 第35行明确说'It smells really vanilla'，这是Hailey描述她最喜欢的香水的特点。

questions.question: What does Hailey use the pocket mirror for?
questions.explanation: 第19行说'this is a little pocket mirror that I keep with me for touch-ups and what have you'，即用于补妆等整理仪表的用途。

questions.question: What does Hailey say about the tincture potion she got?
options: C) It would make someone fall in love with her
questions.explanation: 第10-11行提到'a little tincture potion that I got. She told me that it would make a young Canadian pop star fall in love with me.'这是一种据说能让人爱上她的爱情魔药。

questions.question: How does Hailey describe her DNA mask?
options: A) It's made with fish eggs
questions.explanation: 第42-47行提到需要追踪非常稀有的太阳鱼并收获它们的卵，但1000个中只能收获1个因为那些卵有正确的DNA。这是一个非常稀有珍贵的面膜。

questions.question: What does 'at all times' mean in the video?
questions.explanation: 第12行和第21行都提到'at all times'，意思是'ready all the time'（随时），表示她总是带着某些东西。

questions.question: What is Bonnie in the video?
questions.explanation: 第25行说'I read online that videos with small animals get a lot more likes'，结合第43行'So, this is Bonnie'和第267行的画面，Bonnie是Hailey的宠物狗。

questions.question: What does Hailey say about her scrunchie?
options: B) She keeps it with her
questions.explanation: 第39行说'this is my scrunchie that obviously I keep with me'，Hailey说她把这个发圈随身带着。

questions.question: What does 'touch-ups' refer to in the video?
questions.explanation: 'Touch-ups'指的是快速整理、补妆，在第19行提到pocket mirror用于'touch-ups'，即补妆、整理仪表。

questions.question: How old was Hailey when she first tried the tincture potion?
questions.explanation: 第46行说'I would say probably when I was around 12'，这是Hailey提到她大概12岁左右尝试了这个爱情魔药。

questions.question: What does Hailey say at the end of the video?
questions.explanation: 第3行说'Thank you, Vogue'，第37行说'Love you'，视频结尾Hailey既感谢了Vogue也表达了感谢。

questions.question: What does 'Delicious' refer to in the video context?
questions.explanation: 第5行提到'This is my Haley Bieber smoothie'，第16行Hailey说'Delicious'，这是在品尝她的smoothie后的评价。

questions.question: Please describe what items Hailey Bieber shows in her bag and their purposes. Use your own words to summarize.
questions.explanation: 口语题要求学生用自己的话复述视频中Hailey包里的物品及其用途。
questions.referenceAnswer: Hailey展示了包里的多种物品：1) hand cream - 用于滋润干燥的手部；2) sleeping mask - 睡眠时使用的面膜；3) perfume - 她最喜欢的香水，有香草味；4) lip treatment - 唇部护理产品；5) phone - 用于社交媒体；6) pocket mirror - 用于补妆；7) scrunchie - 发圈；8) 一个神秘的tincture potion据说是爱情魔药；9) 还有她的宠物狗Bonnie。
questions.hint: Try to mention at least 5 items and their uses. You can start with 'In this video, Hailey Bieber shows several items in her bag, including...'

questions.question: What is your opinion about sharing personal items like skincare products with friends? Would you 'gatekeep' certain items? Explain your reasoning.
questions.explanation: 开放式口语题，让学生表达对于分享个人物品（如护肤品）的看法，以及是否会像Hailey一样对某些特别的东西进行'gatekeeping'（藏着掖着）。
questions.referenceAnswer: 这道题没有标准答案，学生可以自由表达观点。可以从以下几个角度回答：1) 分享的好处（增进友谊、试用新产品）；2) 不分享的原因（个人卫生、特别的意义、昂贵的价格）；3) 是否认同'gatekeeping'这种行为。
questions.hint: You can express your opinion by saying 'In my opinion...' or 'I think...' and give reasons. For example, 'I would share basic items but keep special ones to myself because...'

questions.question: If you were to create a 'magic potion' like Hailey mentioned, what would you want it to do? Describe your imaginary potion.
questions.explanation: 创意口语题，让学生发挥想象力，描述如果他们像Hailey一样有一瓶魔法药剂，会希望它有什么效果。
questions.referenceAnswer: 本题为开放性题目，学生可以自由发挥想象力，例如：1) 让考试顺利的聪明药水；2) 让心情永远愉快的快乐药水；3) 让人实现梦想的梦想药水；4) 让友谊长存的友情药水等。
questions.hint: Use your imagination! You can say 'If I could create a magic potion, I would want it to...' and describe what effect you want it to have.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of Hailey's pocket mirror according to the video?
options: B) For touch-ups and quick fixes
questions.explanation: 第19行明确说'for touch-ups and what have you'，即用于快速整理仪表、补妆等用途。

questions.question: What does 'what have you' mean in the phrase 'for touch-ups and what have you'?
options: A) And other things like that
questions.explanation: 'What have you'是一个常见的口语表达，意思是'等等'、'诸如此类的东西'，用于列举未尽事宜。

questions.question: Why does Hailey mention that she reads online that videos with small animals get more likes?
options: A) To explain why Bonnie is in the video
B) To complain about her low views
C) To show she doesn't care about likes
D) To ask viewers to like her video
questions.explanation: 第25行Hailey说'I read online that videos with small animals get a lot more likes and comments'，然后第43行介绍'So, this is Bonnie'，这解释了为什么她要在视频中展示她的狗狗。
